source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION SAGE-AGICAP-SG\Connexion SAGE - Agicap - SG.xlsx
fact: Payment files are imported from Sage payment methods into Agicap in the 'A signer' tab.
claude_action: Use to describe the current operational handoff from Sage to Agicap for payment execution.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION SAGE-AGICAP-SG\Connexion SAGE - Agicap - SG.xlsx
fact: Once a payment file is imported into the Agicap 'A signer' tab, it is described as no longer modifiable in Agicap.
claude_action: Use as a mitigating control claim, but cross-check against later training materials showing cancellation/rework risk.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION SAGE-AGICAP-SG\Connexion SAGE - Agicap - SG.xlsx
fact: The setup workbook references an EBICS TS contract as part of the payment connection model.
claude_action: Map EBICS TS as part of the production payment-transmission architecture.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION SAGE-AGICAP-SG\Connexion SAGE - Agicap - SG.xlsx
fact: The workbook identifies a bot account, bot+abivax@agicap-lab.com, used to automate actions that would otherwise be manual.
claude_action: Flag bot-account governance and access review as part of future SoD and security design.

fact: Training materials state that wire files are contractually limited to 10 million euros per file at SG via EBICS, while a 5 million euro threshold exists in Agicap and can be lifted by an Agicap administrator or validated by Roxandra for payments between 5 and 10 million euros.
claude_action: Use as a current-state payment-limit fact and identify whether future ERP or TMS design needs threshold logic or override governance.

fact: Training materials describe a vulnerability where a payment cancelled in 'A signer' returns to 'A preparer', after which the bank account of an existing third party could be changed and the payment resent for signature without an alert email.
claude_action: Treat as a material design risk and reconcile against any claim that imported files are non-modifiable.

fact: The training notes indicate administrators receive an email if a new third party is added by import.
claude_action: Use as a possible compensating control but confirm exact recipient list and retention of notification evidence.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION SAGE-AGICAP-SG\RE Sécurisation du dossier AgicapExports - IT confirmation Trinidad.msg
fact: The Agicap export folder is C:\Agicap\Exports on the Sage remote desktop; payment files generated by Sage 100 are automatically exported via SFTP to Agicap and removed after export to avoid local retention.
claude_action: Use as core evidence for operational payment-file handling and ephemeral local storage.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION SAGE-AGICAP-SG\RE Sécurisation du dossier AgicapExports - IT confirmation Trinidad.msg
fact: The Agicap export folder is hidden and read-only to users, and only Juliette and Fatma have write access.
claude_action: Map this directly into preparer access and privileged-user design for the France payment process.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION SAGE-AGICAP-SG\RE Sécurisation du dossier AgicapExports - IT confirmation Trinidad.msg
fact: A nightly audit-trail CSV is generated in C:\Script\Export_Events and the location is also hidden and read-only.
claude_action: Flag as source evidence for payment-file export monitoring and ask whether the CSV is reviewed or only retained.
